name: browzer
description: AI agent skills to empower it with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Twenty-four skills around the `browzer` CLI: RAG (embed-workspace-graphs, embed-documents, explore-workspace-graphs, semantic-search, dependency-graph, ingestion-jobs), workflow (brainstorming → generate-prd → generate-task → execute-task | execute-with-teams → code-review → receiving-code-review → write-tests → update-docs → feature-acceptance → commit → sync-workspace), orchestration (orchestrate-task-delivery with mandatory `CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS` probe + execution-strategy prompt), ops (auth-status, workspace-management), and tools (use-rag-cli, browzer-bootstraper, find-skills). Code-review spawns 4 mandatory parallel agents — senior-engineer, software-architect, qa, regression-tester — the last running the canonical pre-push gate (`pnpm turbo test --filter='...[origin/main]'`) at PACKAGE granularity, enumerating failures per-test, and reproducing each against `main` via git stash for accurate `preExistingOnMain` flagging. Receiving-code-review closes EVERY finding with a 7-step ladder (sonnet → research → opus → research → log to tech-debt). Write-tests authors green coverage AND runs Stryker/mutmut/go-mutesting in the same pass. Feature-acceptance Phase 1.5 live-verifies; §2.5.1 metric anti-soft-override regex blocks autonomous `resolved:true` flips on dashboard/browser/`/ask`/`/sync` metrics without operator reply. Ships a `Stop` hook (orchestrator-autochain.py) that enforces autonomous chain continuation machine-checkably. Universal subagent preamble requires `browzer deps --reverse` blast-radius probing before any edit.

BROWZER_SERVER.title: Browzer server URL
BROWZER_SERVER.description: Base URL of the Browzer gateway (e.g. https://browzeremb.com or http://localhost:8080).

BROWZER_API_KEY.title: Browzer API key
BROWZER_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for non-interactive login. If unset, run `browzer login` once interactively.
